safe_title: CLI tool count in README doesn't match actual package.json bin entries
safe_summary: Documentation stated 17 CLI tools but package.json only contained 16 bin entries. Counts for files, prompts, and panels also drifted from reality over multiple updates.
safe_root_cause: Numeric counts in docs were updated independently from source of truth (package.json, directory listings). No automated cross-check between docs and code.

patch_suggestions.workflow_patch: Before committing doc updates, run: (a) count bin entries in package.json, (b) count files in .agents/, (c) count prompts in prompts/. Cross-check all numbers.

verifier.name: count-verification-script
verifier.details: Counted package.json bin entries = 16, .agents/rules = 9, .agents/skills = 8, .agents/workflows = 10, prompts = 5. All matched README.
